title: Trebol Turns the Trap
description: Pages 16–16 focus on trebol turns the trap, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as sugar, Trebol, Usopp, Robin, and the Tontatta collide in the tower as the rescue plan begins to fail.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: All the lost memories will return!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: All the evil will be exposed...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: And the true nature of the pirate...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: One piece is on break next week.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: to rescue our friends!! to take back the kingdom for King Riku!!
